before.title: Run governed migration from current provenance to UOR-backed identity
before.description: Upgrade existing memory artifacts into the UOR identity model with explicit audits, rollback affordances, and conflict reporting so the migration itself is governed and reversible.
acceptance: Existing memory artifacts can be migrated into the UOR identity model.
Migration writes an auditable report of converted, skipped, and contested artifacts.
Rollback path exists if identity conflicts or provenance gaps are discovered.
